scripts.test: pnpm --filter @rovy/core test && pnpm --filter @rovy/networking test && pnpm --filter @rovy/ui test && pnpm --filter @rovy/datastore test && pnpm --filter rovy-transformer test && pnpm --filter rovy-build test
scripts.pack:local: pnpm --filter @rovy/core build && pnpm --filter @rovy/networking build && pnpm --filter @rovy/ui build && pnpm --filter @rovy/world-inspector build && pnpm --filter @rovy/datastore build && pnpm --filter rovy-transformer build && pnpm --filter rovy-build build && mkdir -p build && find build -maxdepth 1 -name '*.tgz' -delete && for pkg in packages/jecs packages/core packages/networking packages/ui packages/world-inspector packages/datastore packages/transformer packages/build; do pnpm --dir "$pkg" pack --pack-destination "$PWD/build" >/dev/null; done
